message:
🌱 knative-eventing: Trigger without a broker does not correctly reflect ready status (#1913)

* 🌱 Add knative-eventing: Trigger without a broker does not correctly reflect ready mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "knative-eventing-2996-trigger-without-a-broker-does-not-correctly-reflect-ready-",
+  "missionClass": "fixer",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "knative-eventing: Trigger without a broker does not correctly reflect ready status",
+    "description": "Trigger without a broker does not correctly reflect ready status. Community-reported issue.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify knative-eventing troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your knative-eventing deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n knative-eventing -l app.kubernetes.io/name=knative-eventing\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=knative-eventing -n knative-eventing --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review knative-eventing configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant knative-eventing configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n knative-eventing -l app.kubernetes.io/name=knative-eventing\nkubectl get configmap -n knative-eventing -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=knative-eventing\n```\napply a trigger with a missing broker, the `READY` and `REASON` status fields have no info \n\n It should be stated that the trigger is not `ready` and give a `reason`\n\n **To Reproduce**\n\napply a trigger, but have no broker\n\n **Knative release"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Trigger without a broker does not correctly reflect ready…",
+        "description": "- If trigger points to non-existent Broker, set status to failed with error message.\n```yaml\n{\n  \"level\": \"error\",\n  \"ts\": \"2020-04-15T14:28:48.706Z\",\n  \"logger\": \"broker-controller\",\n  \"caller\": \"broker/reconciler.go:144\",\n  \"msg\": \"resource \\\"default/default\\\" no longer exists\",\n  \"commit\": \"02bc516\",\n  \"knative.dev/traceid\": \"82fc04a2-31dc-476f-a3cf-abb1613925b1\",\n  \"knative.dev/key\": \"default/default\",\n  \"stacktrace\": \"knative.dev/eventing/pkg/client/injection/reconciler/eventing/v1alpha1/broker.(*reconcilerImpl).Reconcile\\n\\tknative.dev/eventing/pkg/client/injection/reconciler/eventing/v1alpha1/broker/reconciler.go:144\\nknative.dev/eventing/vendor/knative.dev/pkg/controller.(*Imp\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Trigger without a broker does not correctly… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=knative-eventing -n knative-eventing --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n knative-eventing --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "- If trigger points to non-existent Broker, set status to failed with error message.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "{\n  \"level\": \"error\",\n  \"ts\": \"2020-04-15T14:28:48.706Z\",\n  \"logger\": \"broker-controller\",\n  \"caller\": \"broker/reconciler.go:144\",\n  \"msg\": \"resource \\\"default/default\\\" no longer exists\",\n  \"commit\": \"02bc516\",\n  \"knative.dev/traceid\": \"82fc04a2-31dc-476f-a3cf-abb1613925b1\",\n  \"knative.dev/key\": \"default/default\",\n  \"stacktrace\": \"knative.dev/eventing/pkg/client/injection/reconciler/eventing/v1alpha1/broker.(*reconcilerImpl).Reconcile\\n\\tknative.dev/eventing/pkg/client/injection/reconciler/eventing/v1alpha1/broker/reconciler.go:144\\nknative.dev/eventing/vendor/knative.dev/pkg/controller.(*Impl).processNextWorkItem\\n\\tknative.dev/eventing/vendor/knative.dev/pkg/controller/controller.go:394\\nknative.dev/eventing/vendor/knative.dev/pkg/controller.(*Impl).Run.func2\\n\\tknative.dev/eventing/ven"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "knative-eventing",
+      "graduated",
+      "app-definition",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "knative-eventing"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/knative/eventing/issues/2996",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/knative/eventing",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/knative/eventing/pull/3144"
+    },
+    "reactions": 2,
+    "comments": 16,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with knative-eventing installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-04-02T06:30:35.464Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
